metadata.title: DeutschTest.pro — AI Simulator for the Goethe-Zertifikat
metadata.description: Prepare for the Goethe-Zertifikat with AI-generated exams. Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, Sprechen — all on one platform.

hero.subtitle: Realistic exam simulation with AI-generated tasks, automatic scoring and detailed feedback.
hero.subtitleGuest: Sign up and get a free test.
hero.subtitleFreeAvailable: Your free trial test is waiting for you.

features.title: All four modules. One platform.
features.subtitle: Every module follows the Goethe-Zertifikat format exactly.

lesen.title: Lesen
lesen.description: AI-generated reading texts with multiple-choice and true/false tasks — just like the real Goethe-Zertifikat.

horen.title: Hören
horen.description: Professionally voiced listening texts with realistic voices. No rewinding — just like the real exam.

schreiben.title: Schreiben
schreiben.description: Writing tasks with AI scoring based on official criteria: task fulfillment, coherence, vocabulary, grammar.

sprechen.title: Sprechen
sprechen.description: Oral exam with voice recording and AI analysis. Pronunciation, fluency and grammar are all scored.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick a module pack and spend your credits on any of the four types: Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, Sprechen.

freeTrial.title: 3 free modules when you sign up — try any module risk-free.

realism.q: How close is the simulator to the real Goethe exam?
realism.a: The format matches one-to-one: the same sections, the same number of tasks, the same time limits, the same assessment criteria as the official Goethe standard. The difference is that every test is uniquely generated by AI. You cannot memorise answers — every session is fresh preparation.

aiScoring.q: How does the AI grade writing and speaking?
aiScoring.a: By the official Goethe criteria: task completion, coherence, vocabulary, grammar — plus fluency and pronunciation for speaking. You get a 0-100 score, a pass/fail verdict, and a detailed breakdown of strengths and weaknesses with concrete recommendations.

officialExam.a: No. DeutschTest.pro is a preparation tool, not an accredited examination centre. The actual certificate can only be issued by the Goethe-Institut or its in-person partners. We prepare you so that you pass there on your first attempt.

modulesPricing.q: What is a module and how do packages work?
modulesPricing.a: A module is one part of the exam: Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, or Sprechen. You choose what to practise — for example, three Sprechen sessions in a row if that is your weakest area. You get 3 free modules on signup. After that, you buy packages of 10, 20, or 40 modules. No subscription, no auto-renewal.

microphone.q: What do I need technically to practise?
microphone.a: For Lesen, Hören, and Schreiben — any browser on desktop, laptop, tablet, or phone. For Sprechen you also need a microphone: a laptop mic, a headset, or your phone's built-in mic all work fine. Nothing to install, configure, or download.

refund.q: Can I get a refund on a package?
refund.a: Yes. If you have bought a package but not yet used any paid modules, we refund the full amount within 14 days. The 3 free modules on signup do not count as usage. Simply email our support team.

teil1.title: Teil 1
teil1.desc: Read the text and the tasks. Are the statements true or false?

teil4.title: Teil 4

teil5.title: Teil 5
teil5.desc: Read the text and choose the right word for each gap.

teil1.title: Teil 1
teil1.desc: You'll hear five short texts. Each text plays twice. True or false?

teil2.title: Teil 2
teil2.desc: You'll hear a conversation. The text plays once. Choose a, b or c.

teil3.title: Teil 3
teil3.desc: You'll hear a conversation. The text plays once. True or false?
